hyperedges.label: Stacked icon composition: panel, mascot fill, eye detail
Red UV islands forming a coordinated accent graphic set on the fighter sheet
Fighter hull: flat albedo + implied material stack
Red livery graphic elements on hull texture
Unified Input Interface: Player, AIController, and NavigationController All Feed Ship Physics
Fleet Command Subsystems Coordinate Exclusively via GameEventBus Signals
XZ Plane Y=0 Enforcement Applies Across Ships, Projectiles, Asteroids, and Debris
All Tunable Values in JSON — ship.json, weapon.json, ai_profiles.json, world_config.json, factions.json
PerformanceMonitor begin/end Required on Every System — Instrumented from Day One
Damage Pipeline: Shield Absorption → Hull → Component Split via damage_type Matrix
Tab Mode Switch Signal Chain: InputManager → game_mode_changed → GameCamera + UI
